---
name: Security Tool Request
about: Request a new security tool to be added to the arsenal
title: '[TOOL] '
labels: enhancement, new-tool
assignees: ''
---

**Tool Category**
Select the category that best fits the proposed tool:
- [ ] 🟢 Beginner
- [ ] 🟡 Intermediate
- [ ] 🔵 Advanced
- [ ] 🔴 Expert

**Tool Type**
- [ ] Offensive / Red Team
- [ ] Defensive / Blue Team
- [ ] Forensics / IR
- [ ] Automation / Orchestration
- [ ] Other

**Description**
A clear description of the tool you'd like to see added and the security concept it teaches.

**Use Case**
Describe a practical scenario where this tool would be useful (in an educational or authorized testing context).

**Similar Tools**
Are there existing open-source tools that do something similar? How would this tool differ?

**Additional Context**
Any references, articles, or documentation that would help in building this tool.
